phase: Phase 7 Display / Graphics Minimal Full Vertical
scope: Add FramebufferDirtyRegionRecord as first-class semantic dirty-region evidence
Add RecordFramebufferDirtyRegion command and FramebufferDirtyRegionTracked event
Validate dirty owner Store, applied FramebufferWrite generation, and clean-state FramebufferFlushRegion generation
Reject stale flush references, missing clean-state flush refs, and payload digest mismatch
Record deterministic host-validation dirty-region tracking in target_executor
Expose framebuffer-dirty-region stable ViewV1 and graph edges through osctl
no_goals: real framebuffer present or scanout flush

findings_fixed: FramebufferDirtyRegion validates exact FramebufferWrite generation instead of tracking by framebuffer id
Clean FramebufferDirtyRegion state requires exact FramebufferFlushRegion generation
FramebufferDirtyRegion rejects stale flush generations and mismatched payload digests
ContractGraph models clean dirty-region references as historical edges to avoid false live ownership
osctl ViewV1 exposes dirty tracking without leaking raw mappings or claiming real present
bad_smells_checked: No real framebuffer present path was added
No raw framebuffer pointer or DMW pointer-mode mapping was added
No third-party graphics crate was added
No adapter-internal state became semantic truth
Dirty region tracking is event-visible and generation-attributed

G10 owns snapshot barrier enforcement for active framebuffer leases, mappings, and dirty regions
